Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, pricing, and featured categories.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product information and live promotions, eliminating manual content research.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email including subject line, body copy, CTAs, and product recommendations using Claude AI.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates and sends the AI-generated marketing email via HubSpot Marketing Email API to targeted contact lists.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company website for current product listings, promotions, and brand messaging.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, order history, and issue descriptions.

R1 Support Agent.impact: Dramatically reduces agent response time by auto-categorizing issues and pre-writing accurate replies, letting the team focus on complex cases.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI classification, attaches the drafted reply, and routes to the appropriate support agent.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Streamlines the support workflow so agents receive pre-triaged, pre-drafted tickets, cutting average handle time significantly.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured in HubSpot from customer interactions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all product return and issue data from Amazon flyer submissions into a single source, preventing data from being siloed in HubSpot.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the extracted issue and return data into a structured Google Sheet for team analysis and trend tracking.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the operations team a real-time, sortable view of return patterns and product issues, enabling faster identification of quality problems and cost-saving decisions.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as R1 website visits, page views, and engagement events.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures high-intent buying signals in real time, ensuring the sales team never misses a warm lead showing active interest.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables immediate sales follow-up while customer intent is highest, dramatically improving conversion odds and shortening sales cycles.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Provides a customer-facing AI chat experience on R1 Concepts properties to answer product questions and assist with orders (in development).
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will offer 24/7 instant customer support, reducing wait times and support ticket volume while improving customer satisfaction.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Integrates with backend systems to retrieve product data, order status, and knowledge base content to power AI responses (architecture in progress).
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will enable accurate, context-rich answers grounded in real product and order data, minimizing hallucination and maximizing resolution rates.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles across platforms.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and synthesizes creator data to produce a curated list of relevant content creators ranked by keyword alignment and reach.

Creator Qualifier.action: Generates a final ranked report with score breakdowns, strengths, weaknesses, and partnership recommendations for each creator.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists from stored Drive documents.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator's email address.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors inbox for incoming creator replies and retrieves full conversation threads for context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed, enabling timely follow-up that keeps negotiation momentum alive.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer negotiation logs, rate benchmarks, and approved conversation frameworks from Drive.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware negotiation replies using the creator's message history and learned conversation patterns.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation reply back to the creator within the existing email thread.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder items, tailored by status — providing ETAs for in-transit parts and alternatives or cancellation options for dead-end parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Proactively keeps customers informed with specific, accurate updates instead of generic delays, improving customer satisfaction and reducing inbound inquiry volume.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes online catalogs from Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile a comprehensive make/model/year reference sheet for all available two-piece rotor applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automatically gathers competitor and supplier catalog data that would take days to manually compile, ensuring complete market coverage across three major brands.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor applications against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps, gaps, and market opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC has coverage and where new product opportunities exist, giving Dino a clear picture of competitive positioning without manual cross-referencing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and interest levels for specific two-piece rotor applications identified in the catalog analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand before committing to new inventory, collecting real customer interest data that informs smarter purchasing and stocking decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Consolidates all scraped data, DFC cross-references, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino's review and decision-making.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, comprehensive reference document that combines supplier data, internal inventory status, and customer demand signals — ready for immediate strategic action.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, searching every field for specific flagged phrases or compliance-sensitive terms.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant, comprehensive ad copy auditing across multiple platforms that would otherwise require manual review of potentially hundreds of active ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes each ad's copy fields to identify exact phrase matches, records the specific field and surrounding context where each match was found, and compiles a structured flagged list.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints exactly where problematic phrases appear with full context, enabling rapid remediation without having to manually locate each instance across ad managers.

Meta Investigation.action: Delivers a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the exact field name, matched phrase, and full copy snippet for immediate review and action.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete compliance audit report directly in the reviewer's inbox on demand, enabling same-day corrections and reducing risk of policy violations or legal exposure.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, which runs daily lead-gen for the Midway Place sublet space; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, giving us a polished new version of our weekly pipeline formatting tool. Steady momentum all around — more updates next week!
